metadata.description: Claude Code plugins for workflow optimization — efficiency auditing, hook diagnosis & repair, zero-overhead quick notes, and loop automation.

plugins.name: hook-doctor
plugins.description: Inspects and repairs Claude Code hook configurations. Detects 7 common misconfigurations and applies safe, idempotent fixes.

plugins.name: efficiency-audit
plugins.description: Analyzes Claude Code conversation transcripts to surface recurring inefficiencies and generate fix recommendations via heuristic rule engine.

plugins.name: quicknotes
plugins.description: Fast, zero-subprocess quick-note capture and management. Notes are centralized markdown files with JSON frontmatter, searchable via grep. The agent uses built-in tools directly — no Python overhead.

plugins.name: loop-creator
plugins.description: Wizard-style interview that generates ready-to-run /loop configurations. Discovers loop candidates from session history and encodes best practices: readiness gate, permission ladder, and manual-before-scheduled discipline.

plugins.name: dev-unslop
plugins.description: Removes AI-generated slop from technical writing — READMEs, PR replies, code comments, docs. Bilingual (EN/ZH) detection of 30+ AI watermark phrases, throat-clearing, filler adjectives, and structural bloat.
